category_sources: Official panache.bz homepage describes Panache as an LSP, formatter, and linter for Markdown-family documents.
source_facts.description says it is a language server, formatter, and linter for Markdown, Quarto, and R Markdown.
display_name_sources: Official panache.bz homepage uses the product name Panache.
docs_sources: Official panache.bz homepage is the primary documentation surface with Quick Start, Getting Started, User Guide, Configuration, and Playground links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/jolars/panache; per instructions, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official panache.bz homepage lists formatter, linter, LSP, CLI, editor, and CI usage for Markdown, Quarto, and R Markdown.
